Bowled: The ball goes through the gate and crashes into middle stump, the batsman is bowled
Late swing beats the bat and the off stump is knocked back
The delivery seams away, clips the off stump, and the bails are sent flying
A skidding ball sneaks past the defense and hits middle stump
Sharp inswing traps the batsman as leg stump is uprooted
The yorker slips under the bat and smashes into the base of the stumps
An inside edge drags the ball back onto the stumps
A thin outside edge trickles back and disturbs the bails
The spinner beats the bat in flight and off stump is knocked over
Big turn off the pitch beats the shot and leg stump is hit
The quicker one rushes the batsman and rattles middle stump
Late dip deceives the drive and the off stump is pegged back
The cross-seam delivery keeps low and takes out the stumps
Wobble seam movement beats the bat and hits the timber
The slider goes straight on and off stump is shattered
The arm ball holds its line and middle stump is struck
The googly turns back in and leg stump is sent cartwheeling
Stumped: The batsman steps out, misses completely, and the keeper whips off the bails
Charging down the pitch, the batsman is beaten in flight and stranded outside the crease
A big swing and a big miss as the keeper removes the bails in a flash
Late dip beats the bat and the batsman is left short of his ground

The quicker delivery deceives the batsman and the stumps are broken behind him
The slider skids through, the bat misses, and the keeper does the rest
The top-spinner beats the batsman in the air and the bails are off
The arm ball goes straight on and the batsman is caught out of his crease
The googly fools the batsman completely and the keeper completes the stumping
A missed sweep leaves the batsman overbalanced and out of his ground
The reverse sweep fails and the keeper removes the bails
Drift away from the bat draws the batsman out and he's stumped
LBW: The ball swings in sharply and strikes the pad in front of the stumps
Seam movement brings the ball back and the front pad takes the impact
The delivery goes straight on and the batsman is trapped in front
Low skid hits the pad right in line with middle stump
Beaten for pace, the batsman takes it on the pad in line
Playing down the wrong line, the pad is struck first
Swing beats the bat and the pad takes the full blow
Seam movement deceives the defense and the pad is hit
The spinner beats the bat and pins the batsman in front
Drift and dip combine as the pad is struck in line
The top-spinner drops suddenly and hits the pad
The slider skids through and the pad is struck
The arm ball holds its line and catches the batsman in front
The googly turns back in and hits the pad in line
A missed sweep results in the pad taking the impact
The reverse sweep fails and the pad is struck
No shot offered and the pad is hit in front
